## Feature checklist

- [ ] Issue was open and phase-approved before development (`docs/FEATURES.md` active phase)
- [ ] Spec read: `docs/features/F*.md`
- [ ] Branch name follows `phase-<n>/<id>-<slug>` (see `.cursor/rules/github-workflow.mdc`)
- [ ] `scripts/github-tasks.manifest.json` updated if feature status changed
- [ ] `docs/features/F*.md` status updated when feature is done
- [ ] `pnpm run test` (and `pnpm run build` if application code changed)
